scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 3 top-level legacy-parity read streams (lists, emails, reports) only; the list-scoped substreams (forms, contacts) require a per-list sub-resource fan-out read the Tier-1 declarative dialect cannot express (see docs.md Known limits) and are blocked pending a Tier-2 StreamHook in a follow-up wave

excluded.reason: sub-resource fan-out over dynamically-listed lists; requires a Tier-2 StreamHook (list lists, then paginate per list, stamping list_id) the declarative dialect cannot express; blocked, see docs.md
